prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 67 名，近年排名在 54–67 之间小幅波动，整体稳定；2023 年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面事件；抖音热度总排名第 68 位，评价「一般」，短视频曝光量一般，无明显报考关注升温信号；安全科学与工程 A+（王牌）、测绘科学与技术 A-、土木工程 A-；安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木类等招生专业对应优势学科，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 本省物理类考生 2025 年 172468 人→2026 年 206500 人，增幅约 19.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，非本省高校，无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考首年位次大幅后移的基准、2026 年扩招 14.2% 的缓解效应与考生规模增长 19.7% 的加剧效应，净竞争仍趋激烈；预测最低位次约 29000 名，区间 28500–29500 名。

- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、信息安全、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电子信息工程/自动化
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 安全科学与工程类（安全工程、消防工程、职业卫生工程、应急技术与管理）
- 机械类（机械工程、智能制造工程）
- 能源动力类（储能科学与工程、能源与动力工程）

- 测绘类（测绘工程、地理信息科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 工商管理类（会计学、人力资源管理、市场营销）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 28500–29500 名内，建议以二档安全科学与工程类（矿大王牌 A+）、机械类、能源动力类为主力填报，一档电气/计算机类专业可冲刺，三档矿业类、土木类作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<28500 名）可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Science/Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 17071→56887 (abnormal gap)→23146→14573→26369, after a significant forward shift to 14573 in 2024, it fell back to 26369 in 2025 due to Shaanxi's first year of the new Gaokao (Physics Category), with severe fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is approximately 26369th place; provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plans: 217 in 2021, 216 in 2022, 208 in 2023, 204 in 2024, 211 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 241, an increase of 30 students (+14.2%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, partially alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 67th in 2026, with slight fluctuations between 54–67 in recent years, overall stable; 2023 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative events; Douyin heat total ranking 68th, evaluation 'average', short video exposure average, no obvious signal of increased application interest; Safety Science and Engineering A+ (flagship), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-; enrollment majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering correspond to advantageous disciplines, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Provincial Physics Category candidates: 172,468 in 2025 → 206,500 in 2026, an increase of approximately 19.7%, a significant increase in candidate numbers, intensifying competition; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a provincial university, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the baseline of a significant backward shift in rankings in the first year of the new Gaokao in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 14.2% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensifying effect of a 19.7% increase in candidate numbers, net competition remains intense; predicted minimum ranking approximately 29,000th, range 28,500–29,500th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 28,500–29,500, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors such as Safety Science and Engineering (CUMT's flagship A+), Mechanical Engineering, and Energy and Power Engineering; Tier 1 majors like Electrical/Computer Science can be targeted as reach options; Tier 3 majors like Mining Engineering and Civil Engineering can serve as safety choices; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<28,500), focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 engineering majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Liberal Arts/History Category minimum rankings approximately 3425→3308→3094→3248→3768, with year-on-year advancement from 2021 to 2023, a slight retreat in 2024, and a significant retreat to 3768 in 2025 due to Shaanxi's first year of the new college entrance examination (History Category); the 2025 baseline is approximately 3768th place; provincial Liberal Arts/History Category plans: 14 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 19 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, an increase of 5 (+26.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; 2023 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity total ranking 68th, rated 'average', with no clear signal of increased application attention; Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, all science and engineering disciplines, weakly related to liberal arts enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Provincial History Category candidates: 75,641 in 2025 → 88,500 in 2026, an increase of approximately 17.0%, with an increase in candidate scale; but the expansion rate (26.3%) is greater than the candidate growth rate (17.0%), with the net effect being a slight easing of competition; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a provincial university, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.text: Combining the baseline of the ranking retreat in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the significant easing effect of a 26.3% expansion in 2026, and the intensifying effect of a 17.0% increase in candidate scale, net competition slightly eases; predicted minimum ranking approximately 4300th, range 3800–4800th.
